sections.title: Will
sections.content:
We use **will** for the future:
• I **will** go tomorrow.
• She **will** be here soon.
• They **won't** (will not) come.

We use **will** when we decide now, or when we offer to do something.

sections.title: Going to
sections.content:
We use **going to** when we already have a plan:
• I **am going to** see him tomorrow.
• She **is going to** buy a new car.
• We **are going to** have a party.

Form: am/is/are + going to + verb

sections.title: When to use which
sections.content:
**Will** – decision now, offer, promise: I'll help you.

**Going to** – plan before now: I'm going to visit my mum next week.

questions.question: She _____ buy a new car next month.
We _____ have a party on Saturday.
The phone is ringing. – I _____ get it.
He _____ not come to the party.
